data.title: BitGo seeks $2B valuation in US IPO, aiming to raise $200M.
data.description: A well-known private cryptocurrency wallet and custody company, BitGo, has submitted paperwork to go public in the United States. The firm is looking to secure up to $200 million through this initial public offering.

data.title: Wall Street predicts December inflation to stay at 2.7%, with monthly rate at 0.3%. Inflation expected to be stable. Betting markets agree - 89% chance of inflation at or below 2.8%.
data.description: On Tuesday, a new inflation report is anticipated to show stability, with consensus economist estimates and prediction markets predicting that the annual inflation rate will hold steady at 2.7% in December. The monthly pace is forecasted to be 0.3%, a minor increase that is not causing significant market worries. The Federal Reserve Bank of Cleveland's Inflation Nowcasting model suggests an even softer outlook, with a projected 0.2% monthly increase and a 2.6% yearly rate. Core inflation, excluding food and energy, is expected to rise slightly from 2.6% to 2.7% annually, with a monthly increase of 0.3%. Traders on prediction markets like Polymarket are echoing the calm sentiment seen on Wall Street, giving an 89% probability that annual inflation will be at or below 2.8%. There is a low chance of higher inflation, with a 6% probability for 2.9% and just 1% for further upticks in inflation.

data.title: Fine Fettle to convert all 9 dispensaries to hybrid on Jan. 15, serving medical patients and adult-use customers in Connecticut.
data.description: Nine Fine Fettle cannabis dispensaries in Connecticut will now cater to both medical patients and adult-use customers, in compliance with a recent state law change. Effective January 15th, all nine Fine Fettle locations will transition into hybrid facilities.

data.title: Former Mayor, Governor, and Social Security Administrator Martin O'Malley joins Liberty Partners Group, a strategic government relations firm.
data.description: On Jan. 12, 2026, Liberty Partners Group, a prominent firm offering government relations and public affairs counsel, revealed that Martin O'Malley, a former Mayor, Governor, and Social Security Administrator, has become part of their team.

data.title: ComEd offers $515,000 grants for public safety, arts, and sustainability projects in Northern Illinois.
data.description: In Chicago, ComEd has opened applications for its Power for Good Grant Programs, offering $515,000 in funding to municipalities and nonprofits. The grants aim to support environmental sustainability, public safety, clean transportation, and access to arts programs. Three programs are open for applications: Green Region, managed by Openlands; Powering Safe initiatives.

data.title: Community Autism Services opens new autism learning center in Haverhill, MA, to offer care for children with ASD.
data.description: A new autism learning center has been inaugurated in Haverhill, MA by Community Autism Services on January 12, 2026. The center aims to offer top-notch care to children with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD). Situated at 3 Ferry Street in Haverhill, this facility will cater to the needs of children affected by ASD in the region.

data.title: Rare earth stocks surged in 2026, with Critical Metals Corp (NASDAQ: CRML) rising 100% and MP Materials Corp (NYSE: MP) up 27%. Geopolitical tensions and US mineral sovereignty push are driving the bullish trend.
data.description: The start of 2026 has witnessed a surge in rare earth stocks due to geopolitical tension and robust industrial policies. This momentum is likely to persist as the U.S. takes definitive steps towards mineral sovereignty. Notably, CRML stock is on the rise. Investors are flocking to companies involved in rare earth minerals following President Donald Trump's emphasis on the sector's national security significance. Critical Metals Corp. (NASDAQ: CRML) has particularly excelled in 2026, with its stock price soaring by 100% since the year began, driven by excitement regarding its Tanbreez project in Greenland. Similarly, other U.S. rare earth companies are experiencing growth, such as MP Materials Corp. (NYSE: MP) which has surged by 27% in 2026 on substantial trading volume. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Rakuten Advertising opens Innovation Labs for AI in Affiliate Marketing, featuring AI Recommendations, launched on Jan 12, 2026.
data.description: Rakuten Advertising has unveiled a new AI hub within its Insights & Analytics portal, offering AI Recommendations to advertisers and publishers. This initiative was introduced on January 12, 2026, in San Mateo, California. Rakuten Advertising is a prominent global affiliate marketing network. This launch represents a focus on Innovation within the company's operations to enhance advertising strategies.

data.title: Boehringer Ingelheim partners with CommonSpirit Health to enhance screening and diagnosis of CKM diseases. CARES Program in Chattanooga and Omaha leads the way.
data.description: A new collaboration has been formed with CommonSpirit Health to enhance adherence to evidence-based guidelines (EBGs), with a focus on improving screening and diagnosis of cardio-kidney-metabolic (CKM) diseases. The partnership aims to implement strategies that will increase adherence to EBGs. Initially launched in Chattanooga, TN and Omaha, NE, the CARES Program will serve as a model for sustainable solutions. This initiative is anticipated to significantly impact patient outcomes and is set to extend to other regions as well.

data.title: Alaska Air Group to webcast Q4 2025 financial results conference call; includes Alaska Airlines, Hawaiian Airlines, and Horizon Air. Scheduled at 11:30 a.m. EST/8:30 a.m. PST.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Alaska Air Group Inc. will host its quarterly conference call at 11:30 a.m. EST/8:30 a.m. PST to review the financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025. Alaska Air Group Inc. is the holding company for Alaska Airlines Inc., Hawaiian Airlines, Inc., and Horizon Air Industries Inc. This call will provide insights into the recent financial results, with stakeholders and investors eagerly awaiting the details. The conference call will be a pivotal moment for the company, consolidating the performance data and setting the tone for future strategies and initiatives.

data.title: Richard A. Rosenbaum of Greenberg Traurig inducted into Lawdragon Hall of Fame for leadership and real estate. 5 others join top lawyers list in 2026.
data.description: Five additional attorneys from Greenberg Traurig have been included in the 2026 Leading Lawyers list. Richard A. Rosenbaum, the Executive Chairman of the global law firm Greenberg Traurig, LLP, has been honored by being inducted into the prestigious Lawdragon Hall of Fame for his exceptional achievements and continued contributions to the legal field.

data.title: n-Lorem and EspeRare collaborate to expand access to ASO therapies for rare genetic diseases in Europe.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in San Diego and Geneva, the n-Lorem Foundation and the EspeRare Foundation disclosed a new partnership aimed at enhancing accessibility in Europe to n-Lorem's antisense oligonucleotide (ASO) treatments for individuals suffering from rare genetic disorders. This collaboration will focus on increasing the reach of these therapies to benefit a larger number of patients in need.

data.title: Catalight and Frontera team up to enhance autism care, aiming to lower costs and enhance quality.
data.description: Today in Denver and Walnut Creek, California, Catalight and Frontera Health disclosed a new strategic partnership to address challenges faced by the autism industry. With escalating costs and varying quality of care, the collaboration will grant access to Frontera's technology through Catalight's provider network. This initiative aims to enhance services for individuals with autism by leveraging the strengths of both companies.
